signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live MON short. It remains solidly profitable, is still retaining about 75% of peak P&L, and there is no active giveback pressure right now.
BTC is improving, but the edge is still not as clean as the best alternative setups on this board.
ETH is constructive but still lacks enough edge to justify a fresh trade.
SOL remains a good reduced-confidence long because mechanics are bullish and funding is still slightly negative, which supports continuation.
STBL remains a clean bearish fade because funding is extremely positive, crowding is high, and the market still looks vulnerable to reversal.
MAVIA is another clean fade because funding is strongly positive, crowding is high, and the tape quality is too weak to trust on the long side.
HEMI has also migrated into fade territory because funding is strongly positive and the board has softened enough that upside continuation looks fragile.
HMSTR is too illiquid and noisy to be a serious setup.
ZEREBRO still lacks the trade quality and clear edge needed for action.
PURR remains too thin and low-quality to justify a trade.
COMP is the best long on the board because mechanics are strong and funding is deeply negative enough to support a squeeze-style continuation.
